title: poterium muricatum subsp. magnolii
intro: Poterium muricatum subsp. magnolii, also known as the Mediterranean or Italian germander, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Poterium muricatum subsp. magnolii include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
